extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked with 19km remaining on Civiglio climb, dropped all but MAAS who couldn't counter multiple accelerations, won sprint at 150m to go
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR launched decisive move at 19km (start of Civiglio), forcing selection before final descent rather than on steepest gradients
UAE Emirates used HARPER domestique strength to control Civiglio base, allowing POGAČAR fresh legs for sustained attack phase
MAAS attacked multiple times after being marked but lacked acceleration to drop POGAČAR, revealing sprint-first defensive tactics failed

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Only rider to win Lombardia on first two appearances, attacked 19km out and controlled finale tactically despite being faster sprinter
rider_signals.MAAS Remco: positive: Defended champion status by following POGAČAR's attack and stayed with him entire finale, but multiple counters ineffective against superior finishing speed
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Followed initial POGAČAR move briefly at 19km and salvaged podium at 10-15 seconds, Monument podium breakthrough signals late-career consistency
rider_signals.HARPER Chris: positive: Domestique performance on Civiglio base for Jumbo-Visma controlling pace before UAE took over shows undervalued climbing strength
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: Dropped early on Civiglio among first victims despite being protected rider, signals form drop at season end
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Dropped on Civiglio unable to contest finale in retirement race despite home roads advantage
